summary: The Widman flap procedure is recommended for treating horizontal bone defects in the upper anterior area as it provides optimal exposure for regenerative procedures such as bone grafts and tissue engineering aimed at restoring lost alveolar ridge height and width while maintaining soft-tissue health. Given that this option was selected by Agent2 based on its comprehensive approach addressing both hard-soft tissues balance crucially required here; hence B remains valid choice aligning with standard
